title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 20 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 20 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 20 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/07/2024
DCE iron ore futures fall today. an decrease of 0.19% throughout the day;some traders were negative to sell, Some steel procurement more cautious, the continuation of a small number of multi-frequency procurement strategy. PBF at Shandong port dealt 795- 805 yuan/mt; decreased 5 yuan/mt over yesterday..
